data.title: 国际服「Serenade Promenade」预约页面上线
data.summary: ['Serenade Promenade' Pre-Registration & Roadmap Open Notice] Sensei, to celebrate the upcoming 'Ser
data.body:
['Serenade Promenade' Pre-Registration & Roadmap Open Notice]

Sensei, to celebrate the upcoming 'Serenade Promenade' update, a special page for pre-registration and the update roadmap is now available! ✨

You can also find details about the upcoming Kivotos Live on Friday, April 11th through this page!

Please check below for more information~

➡️ Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2777495

#BlueArchive
![image.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/526/J0nsHARZPl2aZKkdxteKHuOC27Yh00U4.png)
